title: Middle Office Operations
description:
Key Responsibilities

  • Primarily responsible for the middle office functions of the Bank in relation to:

- Securities and derivatives

-Settlement and transfers

- Corporate actions

- Funds processing including subscription and redemption

- Regulatory Reporting

- FX and cash management

- Nostro and custodian relationships management

  • Establish and maintain risk assessments to identify and assess risks that arise in the area of responsibility
  • Document policies, operating procedures and relevant controls to meet Bank, local and regulatory requirements, including testing and certifying (or considers and escalates) the adequacy and effectiveness on a regular basis.
  • Ensure rigorous enforcement of requisite controls in accordance with the Bank’s policies and timely clearance and escalation of risk issues
  • Comply with external and internal compliance and regulatory requirements, including the Bank’s policies, operating procedures and controls to meet the Bank’s and regulatory requirements and protect the business from financial and reputational risk
  • Review and prepare management reporting
  • Oversee outsourcing activities and regularly review KPIs with service providers
  • Constant process review to improve the efficiency
  • Work with regional and Head Office for business continuity and coverage planning
  • Participate in projects and initiatives, system enhancements, testing and implementation

Job Requirements

  • 3-5 years of relevant experience in Private Banking, supporting end-to-end middle office processes
  • Well versed with local regulatory requirements and best practice for private banking industry
  • Strong team player, able to multi-task and work in a fast-paced environment
  • Well-developed analytical and technical skills
  • Excellent communication and inter-personal skills, capable of working under pressure and adept at embracing challenges and opportunities.

postedCompany.description: Union Bancaire Privée (UBP) was founded in 1969 by Edgar de Picciotto, whose vision from the outset was to offer investors an astute and innovative wealth management service. With assets under management of CHF 148.2 billion as at the end of June 2022 and a professional, global workforce of around 2,000 people, UBP is a major player in Switzerland’s wealth-management industry. Headquartered in Geneva, the Bank has over twenty locations in key economic and financial hubs worldwide, enabling it to combine global expertise with local know-how.
postedCompany.name: UNION BANCAIRE PRIVEE, UBP SA

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
